title: Problem Discovery Before Solution Commitment · Product Reasoning Brief: Evidence Source Quality
summary: A community partner asks for an app, but the underlying decision, present workaround, affected users, frequency, severity, and evidence are unknown. Predict the decision, affected people, evidence strength, failure cost, and transfer limit before seeing a worked case. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pp1 evidence source quality increment in problem evidence dossier. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare direct observation, interview, artifact, analytics, support, market, and assumption evidence for relevance and bias.
Observe or reconstruct the current workflow with roles, triggers, inputs, handoffs, delays, exceptions, and consequences.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-1 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-1
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Predict Evidence Source Quality · Theory Evidence Source Quality
steps.instruction:
theory case — A neighborhood service requests a mobile app while observed handoffs suggest the delay comes from policy, language access, and incomplete intake information. The theory variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Evidence Source Quality contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Evidence Source Quality · Theory Evidence Source Quality.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for compare direct observation, interview, artifact, analytics, support, market, and assumption evidence for relevance and bias. For Predict Evidence Source Quality · Theory Evidence Source Quality, keep Evidence Source Quality connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: A neighborhood service requests a mobile app while observed handoffs suggest the delay comes from policy, language access, and incomplete intake information. content.text: Compare direct observation, interview, artifact, analytics, support, market, and assumption evidence for relevance and bias. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name the stakeholder decision, affected people, authority, assumption, revision, artifact, observable behavior, changed case, rejected failure, accessibility, security, privacy, operation, recovery, contribution, residual risk, and transfer limit; then calibrate the public claim to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Evidence Source Quality while producing problem evidence dossier.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A neighborhood service requests a mobile app while observed handoffs suggest the delay comes from policy, language access, and incomplete intake information. The worked example variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Compare direct observation, interview, artifact, analytics, support, market, and assumption evidence for relevance and bias. A defensible solution applies Evidence Source Quality, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to problem evidence dossier.

content.code:
# Worked focus: pp1-evidence-source-quality — Compare direct observation, interview, artifact, analytics, support, market, and assumption evidence for relevance and bias.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: changed-product-4
focus: pp1-evidence-source-quality
decision-evidence: Compare direct observation, interview, artifact, analytics, support, market, and assumption evidence for relevance and bias.
stakeholder: affected-user review panel
decision: continue only if the changed task meets its outcome and guardrails
artifact: revision-bound evidence packet
claim: one bounded behavior survives the changed context
verify: reproduce the task, inspect the artifact, and compare the predeclared measure
changed-case: different access need, input, constraint, and dependency failure
failure: reject plausible output without causal, human, recovery, or ownership evidence
repair: isolate the first unsupported transition, correct it, and add a regression
owner: named learner and stakeholder reviewer
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research and release environment
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

options.text: Reconstruct the conditions for Evidence Source Quality, gather a counterexample, repair the artifact, and add a regression case.

Keep the Evidence Source Quality artifact unchanged and rewrite its explanation so the unsupported output appears intentional. That claim fails the repair the evidence source quality defect evidence boundary for Evidence Source Quality.

For repair the evidence source quality defect, apply Evidence Source Quality without its stated preconditions, omit the problem evidence dossier trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Evidence Source Quality for problem evidence dossier.

steps.title: Defend the Evidence Source Quality model · Theory Evidence Source Quality
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Evidence Source Quality: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A neighborhood service requests a mobile app while observed handoffs suggest the delay comes from policy, language access, and incomplete intake information. The theory variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Compare direct observation, interview, artifact, analytics, support, market, and assumption evidence for relevance and bias.

Evidence target: Defend the Evidence Source Quality model · Theory Evidence Source Quality.
steps.why: Retrieving Evidence Source Quality through the concrete problem evidence dossier case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Defend the Evidence Source Quality model · Theory Evidence Source Quality, keep Evidence Source Quality connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Compare direct observation, interview, artifact, analytics, support, market, and assumption evidence for relevance and bias.
